name: gyms
extraction_prompt:
Extract the following from this gym/fitness website. Return JSON only, no other text.

Fields to extract:
- gym_type: type (traditional gym, crossfit, yoga, pilates, boxing, boutique, etc.)
- classes: list of classes offered
- membership_prices: membership tiers and prices if available
- amenities: list (pool, sauna, showers, parking, childcare, etc.)
- personal_training: whether they offer personal training (true/false)
- free_trial: whether they offer a free trial (true/false) and duration
- open_24h: whether open 24 hours (true/false)
- group_classes: true/false
- equipment_brands: notable equipment if mentioned

If information is not found, use null for that field.
content_templates: Gyms With Free Trials in {city}: Complete Guide ({year})
CrossFit Boxes in {city}: Ranked by Members ({year})
